comment.body:
As an aside, highlighting/copy/pasting names works just fine here (i.e. راشد المنصوري) - (When I was growing up - heck, well into at least my 20's - there was no way a typical US market computer would know what to do with that name as text and now we have this amazing software that we can all just download that renders almost anything and handle it as easy as 'abc')

At least just before you hang up your hat Alma I'd also like to know how you work out the mean reversion levels... you get so much into that one basic #.
